== Notes for [[Item:Q101192|Q101192]] ==

Teresa de Cartagena (Burgos, c.1425–?) was a Spanish writer, mystic and nun who is considered to be the first Spanish female writer and mystic during the 15th century.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Teresa_de_Cartagena

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9BDBF31EFBBFA9822EF79916CCF2B
geni:6000000043585891604

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
